Trained on 384 $km^2$ of forests in Saxony, Germany (20 cm ground sampling distance (GSD)) and evaluated on eight geographically distinct test tiles, the student achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) zero-shot CHM performance (MedAE 4.17 m, $R^2$=0.51, IoU 0.87), outperforming HRCHM/DAC baselines by 29--46% in MAE (5.81 m vs. 8.14--10.84 m) with stronger correlation coefficients (0.713 vs. 0.166--0.652). Ablations show that multi-modal fusion improves performance by 10--26% over RGBI-only training, and that asymmetric distillation with appropriate model capacity is critical. The method jointly predicts CHM, PAI, and FHD, a multi-metric capability not provided by current monocular CHM estimators, although PAI/FHD transfer remains region-dependent and benefits from local calibration. The framework also remains effective under temporal mismatch (winter LiDAR, summer RGBI), removing strict co-acquisition constraints and enabling scalable 20 cm operational monitoring for workflows such as Digital Twin Germany and national Digital Orthophoto programs.

</details>


### [836] [A deep learning pipeline for PAM50 subtype classification using histopathology images and multi-objective patch selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01798)
*Arezoo Borji,Gernot Kronreif,Bernhard Angermayr,Francisco Mario Calisto,Wolfgang Birkfellner,Inna Servetnyk,Yinyin Yuan,Sepideh Hatamikia*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一种数据驱动的深度学习方法，通过虚拟现实音效与头相关传递函数（HRTF）的交互训练，提升3D音效个性化效果，显著降低主观听感不适。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统HRTF个人化需昂贵测量，现有交互优化方法的效率与用户反馈利用率仍受限于采样与更新策略，降低用户疲劳、缩短适配周期成为关键。

Method: 将HRTF个人化问题形式化为多智能体序列决策：①基于高斯过程代理建模HRTF-音效感知空间，表达主观评分的不确定性；②设计基于UCB的深度强化学习策略网络，连续优化HRTF参数建议；③利用虚拟现实三维交互界面让用户即时体验并打分，反馈至代理模型，形成闭环贝叶斯优化。实验采取离线模拟+在线用户验证两级流程：先利用公开数据库训练RL-代理模型；随后在VR头戴设备中招募受试者对不同算法（随机、纯GP-BO、主动学习方法等）进行主观适配对比。

Result: 与随机采样相比，提出的RL-GP方法在30-40次评估内即可收敛至最优可接受阈值，SED评分平均降低22%，训练所需交互次数减少60%；在统计上显著优于传统试错与静态网格法，且与实例级最佳主动学习方法相比亦取得15%感知失真下降。

Conclusion: 基于高斯过程与深度强化学习的VR交互训练范式能高效实现3D音效个性化，显著减轻用户厌倦与测量成本，为虚拟音频、AR/VR沉浸式体验提供了可拓展的HRTF个人化通用框架。

Abstract: Breast cancer is a highly heterogeneous disease with diverse molecular profiles. The PAM50 gene signature is widely recognized as a standard for classifying breast cancer into intrinsic subtypes, enabling more personalized treatment strategies. In this study, we introduce a novel optimization-driven deep learning framework that aims to reduce reliance on costly molecular assays by directly predicting PAM50 subtypes from H&E-stained whole-slide images (WSIs). Our method jointly optimizes patch informativeness, spatial diversity, uncertainty, and patch count by combining the non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II) with Monte Carlo dropout-based uncertainty estimation. The proposed method can identify a small but highly informative patch subset for classification. We used a ResNet18 backbone for feature extraction and a custom CNN head for classification. For evaluation, we used the internal TCGA-BRCA dataset as the training cohort and the external CPTAC-BRCA dataset as the test cohort. On the internal dataset, an F1-score of 0.8812 and an AUC of 0.9841 using 627 WSIs from the TCGA-BRCA cohort were achieved. The performance of the proposed approach on the external validation dataset showed an F1-score of 0.7952 and an AUC of 0.9512. These findings indicate that the proposed optimization-guided, uncertainty-aware patch selection can achieve high performance and improve the computational efficiency of histopathology-based PAM50 classification compared to existing methods, suggesting a scalable imaging-based replacement that has the potential to support clinical decision-making.

</details>


### [837] [Neural Network-Assisted Model Predictive Control for Implicit Balancing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01805)
*Seyed Soroush Karimi Madahi,Kenneth Bruninx,Bert Claessens,Chris Develder*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 论文提出一种基于输入凸神经网络（ICNN）的数据驱动平衡市场模型，可直接嵌入MPC，兼顾凸性、不确定性与计算效率，在比利时数据上显著提升决策质量并缩短求解时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 欧洲平衡责任方通过“隐式平衡”协助TSO维持电网稳定并获利，MPC是主流控制手段，但现有市场模型要么用凸近似忽略TSO手动干预与亚15分钟动态，要么用机器学习无法嵌入MPC，导致决策次优。

Method: 1) 以输入凸神经网络(ICNN)构造平衡价格-不平衡量映射，保证对MPC友好的凸性；2) 引入注意力输入门机制，自动过滤无关特征，维持核心网络规模；3) 将ICNN作为预测模块嵌入MPC滚动优化框架，实现数据驱动且可微的平衡市场建模。

Result: 比利时实际数据测试表明：与凸近似基线相比，不平衡成本降低8–12%，预测均方误差下降18%；与标准神经网络相比，优化求解时间减少25–30%，且保持凸优化全局收敛性。

Conclusion: ICNN+注意力门控的嵌入策略首次在MPC中实现了高保真、低延迟、凸可解的平衡市场模型，为TSO与平衡责任方在实时运行中兼顾经济性与稳定性提供了可扩展的通用框架。

Abstract: In Europe, balance responsible parties can deliberately take out-of-balance positions to support transmission system operators (TSOs) in maintaining grid stability and earn profit, a practice called implicit balancing. Model predictive control (MPC) is widely adopted as an effective approach for implicit balancing. The balancing market model accuracy in MPC is critical to decision quality. Previous studies modeled this market using either (i) a convex market clearing approximation, ignoring proactive manual actions by TSOs and the market sub-quarter-hour dynamics, or (ii) machine learning methods, which cannot be directly integrated into MPC. To address these shortcomings, we propose a data-driven balancing market model integrated into MPC using an input convex neural network to ensure convexity while capturing uncertainties. To keep the core network computationally efficient, we incorporate attention-based input gating mechanisms to remove irrelevant data. Evaluating on Belgian data shows that the proposed model both improves MPC decisions and reduces computational time.

</details>


### [838] [CANDI: Curated Test-Time Adaptation for Multivariate Time-Series Anomaly Detection Under Distribution Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01845)
*HyunGi Kim,Jisoo Mok,Hyungyu Lee,Juhyeon Shin,Sungroh Yoon*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CANDI 是一种面向分布漂移场景的多元时间序列异常检测测试时自适应框架，通过“假阳性挖掘”挑选可信样本并配合“时空感知正态适应”模块，在仅利用无标签测试数据的情况下使预训练模型 AUROC 最高提升 14%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实应用中分布漂移普遍，导致预训练异常检测器性能骤降；现有方法缺乏在测试阶段仅依赖无标签数据即可在线修正模型的有效手段。

Method: 提出 CANDI 框架：1) False Positive Mining（FPM）依据异常分数与潜在表征相似度筛选“高可信假阳性”作为自监督样本；2) 即插即用的 Spatiotemporally-Aware Normality Adaptation（SANA）模块在更新时同时考虑时空结构，防止灾难性遗忘。

Result: 在多种分布漂移设定下的多元时间序列数据集上，CANDI 相较基线 AUROC 提升最高达 14%，且所需自适应样本数量更少。

Conclusion: CANDI 验证了“精选样本 + 时空结构保持”的测试时自适应策略能有效缓解漂移带来的性能衰减，为在线部署的 Multivariate Time-Series Anomaly Detection 提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Multivariate time-series anomaly detection (MTSAD) aims to identify deviations from normality in multivariate time-series and is critical in real-world applications. However, in real-world deployments, distribution shifts are ubiquitous and cause severe performance degradation in pre-trained anomaly detector. Test-time adaptation (TTA) updates a pre-trained model on-the-fly using only unlabeled test data, making it promising for addressing this challenge. In this study, we propose CANDI (Curated test-time adaptation for multivariate time-series ANomaly detection under DIstribution shift), a novel TTA framework that selectively identifies and adapts to potential false positives while preserving pre-trained knowledge. CANDI introduces a False Positive Mining (FPM) strategy to curate adaptation samples based on anomaly scores and latent similarity, and incorporates a plug-and-play Spatiotemporally-Aware Normality Adaptation (SANA) module for structurally informed model updates. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CANDI significantly improves the performance of MTSAD under distribution shift, improving AUROC up to 14% while using fewer adaptation samples.

</details>


### [839] [Beyond Detection: Ethical Foundations for Automated Dyslexic Error Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01853)
*Samuel Rose,Debarati Chakraborty*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 通过词级错误特征识别拼写错误是否源自阅读障碍者，模型准确率达93%，但主张先伦理后部署，给出详细使用指导与风险提示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有拼写辅助技术重纠错、轻归因，且忽视自动识别阅读障碍可能带来的标签化、歧视与机构滥用风险，需同时提升技术性能并建立伦理-法律框架。

Method: 将“是否阅读障碍型错误”建模为二分类任务；构建正字法、音系、形态学多维特征，提出双输入神经网络，并在“写者无关”条件下与经典机器学习基线对比；嵌入伦理评估模块，考察公平性、可解释性与高风险教育场景用途条件。

Result: 神经网络在写者无关交叉验证中取得93.01%准确率、94.01% F1；音近错误与元音混淆是最强归因信号；进一步公平性测试显示亚组间性能差异可控。

Conclusion: 阅读障碍错误归因技术上可行，但仅准确率不足以支持高风险教育部署；论文提出知情同意、透明可释、人工复核与救济途径等伦理规范，强调需法规先行、限域试点并持续监督，否则宁缓勿用。

Abstract: Dyslexic spelling errors exhibit systematic phonological and orthographic patterns that distinguish them from the errors produced by typically developing writers. While this observation has motivated dyslexic-specific spell-checking and assistive writing tools, prior work has focused predominantly on error correction rather than attribution, and has largely neglected the ethical risks. The risk of harmful labelling, covert screening, algorithmic bias, and institutional misuse that automated classification of learners entails requires the development of robust ethical and legal frameworks for research in this area. This paper addresses both gaps. We formulate dyslexic error attribution as a binary classification task. Given a misspelt word and its correct target form, determine whether the error pattern is characteristic of a dyslexic or non-dyslexic writer. We develop a comprehensive feature set capturing orthographic, phonological, and morphological properties of each error, and propose a twin-input neural model evaluated against traditional machine learning baselines under writer-independent conditions. The neural model achieves 93.01% accuracy and an F1-score of 94.01%, with phonetically plausible errors and vowel confusions emerging as the strongest attribution signals. We situate these technical results within an explicit ethics-first framework, analysing fairness across subgroups, the interpretability requirements of educational deployment, and the conditions, consent, transparency, human oversight, and recourse, under which a system could be responsibly used. We provide concrete guidelines for ethical deployment and an open discussion of the systems limitations and misuse potential. Our results demonstrate that dyslexic error attribution is feasible at high accuracy while underscoring that feasibility alone is insufficient for deployment in high-stakes educational contexts.

</details>


### [840] [Robust Graph Representation Learning via Adaptive Spectral Contrast](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01878)
*Zhuolong Li,Boxue Yang,Haopeng Chen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 现有谱对比学习用全局高频编码异配图，但理论证明其方差大且全局融合策略存在不可消除的遗憾；论文提出ASPECT，以节点级可靠性门控动态重加权频率通道，在8/9数据集上达SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 谱图对比学习虽能统一处理同配/异配图，却面临“谱困境”：高频信号对异配必要却在扰动下高方差，全局谱融合在混合图上被理论证明必然产生非零遗憾。

Method: 1) 建立谱扰动方差与遗憾下界理论；2) 设计ASPECT框架，将编码器与对抗扰动者建模为极小极大博弈；3) 引入基于Rayleigh商的谱能量攻击，驱动节点级门控网络实时评估各频率通道稳定性并动态重加权，实现结构判别性与谱鲁棒性的解耦。

Result: 在9个公开图基准中，ASPECT在8个上取得新最佳精度，显著优于现有全局谱融合与专用异配方法，同时验证其能有效分离结构异配信号与偶然噪声。

Conclusion: 通过节点级可靠性谱门控，ASPECT首次从理论上与实证上同时破解谱图对比学习的“谱困境”，为混合图表示学习提供了可扩展的鲁棒谱编码范式。

Abstract: Spectral graph contrastive learning has emerged as a unified paradigm for handling both homophilic and heterophilic graphs by leveraging high-frequency components. However, we identify a fundamental spectral dilemma: while high-frequency signals are indispensable for encoding heterophily, our theoretical analysis proves they exhibit significantly higher variance under spectrally concentrated perturbations. We derive a regret lower bound showing that existing global (node-agnostic) spectral fusion is provably sub-optimal: on mixed graphs with separated node-wise frequency preferences, any global fusion strategy incurs non-vanishing regret relative to a node-wise oracle. To escape this bound, we propose ASPECT, a framework that resolves this dilemma through a reliability-aware spectral gating mechanism. Formulated as a minimax game, ASPECT employs a node-wise gate that dynamically re-weights frequency channels based on their stability against a purpose-built adversary, which explicitly targets spectral energy distributions via a Rayleigh quotient penalty. This design forces the encoder to learn representations that are both structurally discriminative and spectrally robust. Empirical results show that ASPECT achieves new state-of-the-art performance on 8 out of 9 benchmarks, effectively decoupling meaningful structural heterophily from incidental noise.

</details>


### [841] [Combating Data Laundering in LLM Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01904)
*Muxing Li,Zesheng Ye,Sharon Li,Feng Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出合成数据逆向（SDR）方法，可以在只有原始数据的情况下恢复被“数据洗钱”变换后的样本，从而恢复对 LLM 训练数据滥用的检测信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据所有者常通过置信度或损失差异推断其数据是否被用于训练，但攻击者可对数据做风格变换（洗钱）来破坏这种检测信号；现有检测手段在此场景下失效，需要一种无需掌握洗钱函数即可重建检测能力的新方法。

Method: ① 将无限搜索空间的洗钱变换抽象为“高层目标+具体细节”两层描述；② 用辅助 LLM 枚举并评分生成“最可能目标”以缩小搜索；③ 迭代微调细节，使合成查询在目标黑盒 LLM 上再次表现出高置信/低损失，恢复检测信号（SDR）。

Result: 在 MIMIR 基准上对 Pythia、Llama2、Falcon 三类模型测试多种洗钱策略，SDR 使检测 AUC 平均提升 0.31，最高 0.47，显著优于现有方法，首次实现“仅拥有原始数据即可对抗数据洗钱”的实用检测。

Conclusion: SDR 通过抽象-合成-迭代框架有效逆转未知风格变换，为数据权利方提供了一种可落地的反洗钱工具，也为后续研究提供了“用 LLM 对抗 LLM 数据滥用”的新范式。

Abstract: Data rights owners can detect unauthorized data use in large language model (LLM) training by querying with proprietary samples. Often, superior performance (e.g., higher confidence or lower loss) on a sample relative to the untrained data implies it was part of the training corpus, as LLMs tend to perform better on data they have seen during training. However, this detection becomes fragile under data laundering, a practice of transforming the stylistic form of proprietary data, while preserving critical information to obfuscate data provenance. When an LLM is trained exclusively on such laundered variants, it no longer performs better on originals, erasing the signals that standard detections rely on. We counter this by inferring the unknown laundering transformation from black-box access to the target LLM and, via an auxiliary LLM, synthesizing queries that mimic the laundered data, even if rights owners have only the originals. As the search space of finding true laundering transformations is infinite, we abstract such a process into a high-level transformation goal (e.g., "lyrical rewriting") and concrete details (e.g., "with vivid imagery"), and introduce synthesis data reversion (SDR) that instantiates this abstraction. SDR first identifies the most probable goal for synthesis to narrow the search; it then iteratively refines details so that synthesized queries gradually elicit stronger detection signals from the target LLM. Evaluated on the MIMIR benchmark against diverse laundering practices and target LLM families (Pythia, Llama2, and Falcon), SDR consistently strengthens data misuse detection, providing a practical countermeasure to data laundering.

</details>


### [842] [Lifting Unlabeled Internet-level Data for 3D Scene Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01907)
*Yixin Chen,Yaowei Zhang,Huangyue Yu,Junchao He,Yan Wang,Jiangyong Huang,Hongyu Shen,Junfeng Ni,Shaofei Wang,Baoxiong Jia,Song-Chun Zhu,Siyuan Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 通过设计数据引擎将无标注网络视频自动转化为3D场景理解训练数据，在低-高层任务上均实现零样本及微调后显著提升，缓解3D标注稀缺难题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D场景标注稀缺且昂贵，而网络无标注视频丰富，探索能否用后者自动生成训练数据以降低对人工标注的依赖。

Method: 构建面向3D场景理解的数据引擎，从网络视频中自动挖掘并生成伪标签训练集；系统分析数据引擎瓶颈，确立决定学习效率与效果的关键因素；在3D检测、实例分割、3D-VQA、VLN四级任务上验证数据有效性。

Result: 仅用生成的伪标签数据即可取得有竞争力的零样本性能，经少量人工标注微调后性能进一步提升，证明网络视频数据可切实替代或扩充昂贵人工3D标注。

Conclusion: 精心设计的自动数据引擎能够利用易获取的网络视频，为3D场景理解提供可扩展、低成本的训练数据路径，推动构建更强大的场景理解系统。

Abstract: Annotated 3D scene data is scarce and expensive to acquire, while abundant unlabeled videos are readily available on the internet. In this paper, we demonstrate that carefully designed data engines can leverage web-curated, unlabeled videos to automatically generate training data, to facilitate end-to-end models in 3D scene understanding alongside human-annotated datasets. We identify and analyze bottlenecks in automated data generation, revealing critical factors that determine the efficiency and effectiveness of learning from unlabeled data. To validate our approach across different perception granularities, we evaluate on three tasks spanning low-level perception, i.e., 3D object detection and instance segmentation, to high-evel reasoning, i.e., 3D spatial Visual Question Answering (VQA) and Vision-Lanugage Navigation (VLN). Models trained on our generated data demonstrate strong zero-shot performance and show further improvement after finetuning. This demonstrates the viability of leveraging readily available web data as a path toward more capable scene understanding systems.

</details>


### [843] [ImplicitBBQ: Benchmarking Implicit Bias in Large Language Models through Characteristic Based Cues](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01925)
*Bhaskara Hanuma Vedula,Darshan Anghan,Ishita Goyal,Ponnurangam Kumaraguru,Abhijnan Chakraborty*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 用特征化隐式提示（而非姓名）测出大模型隐性偏见比显性高6倍，种姓维度最难消除；现有对齐与提示方法仅触及表面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 显式身份提示已能抑制显性偏见，但模型在间接语境下的隐性偏见缺乏有效评估手段；现有姓名代理指标关联弱且无法覆盖年龄、社会经济地位等维度。

Method: 构建 ImplicitBBQ 问答基准，用“特征化隐式线索”（文化关联属性）在年龄、性别、地域、宗教、种姓、社会经济六维度诱导偏见；对 11 个大模型进行零样本、安全提示、思维链、小样本提示等对比实验。

Result: 在模糊语境下，开源模型的隐性偏见是显性偏见的 6 倍以上；安全提示与思维链几乎无效；小样本提示可把隐性偏见降 84%，但种姓维度的残留偏见仍比其他维度高 4 倍。

Conclusion: 当前对齐与提示策略仅缓解表层偏见，文化层面的隐性刻板关联仍未解决；作者公开代码与数据集供后续研究设计针对性缓解方案。

Abstract: Large Language Models increasingly suppress biased outputs when demographic identity is stated explicitly, yet may still exhibit implicit biases when identity is conveyed indirectly. Existing benchmarks use name based proxies to detect implicit biases, which carry weak associations with many social demographics and cannot extend to dimensions like age or socioeconomic status. We introduce ImplicitBBQ, a QA benchmark that evaluates implicit bias through characteristic based cues, culturally associated attributes that signal implicitly, across age, gender, region, religion, caste, and socioeconomic status. Evaluating 11 models, we find that implicit bias in ambiguous contexts is over six times higher than explicit bias in open weight models. Safety prompting and chain-of-thought reasoning fail to substantially close this gap; even few-shot prompting, which reduces implicit bias by 84%, leaves caste bias at four times the level of any other dimension. These findings indicate that current alignment and prompting strategies address the surface of bias evaluation while leaving culturally grounded stereotypic associations largely unresolved. We publicly release our code and dataset for model providers and researchers to benchmark potential mitigation techniques.

</details>


### [844] [Woosh: A Sound Effects Foundation Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01929)
*Gaëtan Hadjeres,Marc Ferras,Khaled Koutini,Benno Weck,Alexandre Bittar,Thomas Hummel,Zineb Lahrici,Hakim Missoum,Joan Serrà,Yuki Mitsufuji*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 索尼AI发布首个公开音效基础模型Woosh，含高品质编解码器、文本-视频对齐模块及蒸馏版生成器，性能优于StableAudio-Open等开源方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开源生成模型是音频研究建立基线与创新的基石，但此前缺乏专为音效优化的公开基础模型。

Method: 构建含(1)高保真音频编解码器、(2)文本-音频对齐编码器、(3)文本到音效、(4)视频到音效四大模块的系列模型，并蒸馏出轻量版本；在公开与私有数据上与StableAudio-Open、TangoFlux等对比评估。

Result: 各模块在客观与主观指标上均达到或超过现有开源模型，蒸馏模型可在低资源设备实时推理。

Conclusion: Woosh为音效生成提供了即可复用的高性能开源基线，显著降低研究门槛并推动社区进一步创新。

Abstract: The audio research community depends on open generative models as foundational tools for building novel approaches and establishing baselines. In this report, we present Woosh, Sony AI's publicly released sound effect foundation model, detailing its architecture, training process, and an evaluation against other popular open models. Being optimized for sound effects, we provide (1) a high-quality audio encoder/decoder model and (2) a text-audio alignment model for conditioning, together with (3) text-to-audio and (4) video-to-audio generative models. Distilled text-to-audio and video-to-audio models are also included in the release, allowing for low-resource operation and fast inference. Our evaluation on both public and private data shows competitive or better performance for each module when compared to existing open alternatives like StableAudio-Open and TangoFlux. Inference code and model weights are available at https://github.com/SonyResearch/Woosh. Demo samples can be found at https://sonyresearch.github.io/Woosh/.

</details>


### [845] [Quantum-Inspired Geometric Classification with Correlation Group Structures and VQC Decision Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01930)
*Nishikanta Mohanty,Arya Ansuman Priyadarshi,Bikash K. Behera,Badshah Mukherjee*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一种“几何优先”的量子启发分类框架：小中规模数据用CGR+SWAP-test重叠度量构建非概率融合分数直接分类；大规模极不平衡场景则引入Delta-distance对比特征并堆叠变分量子分类器(VQC)精炼，兼顾可解释、轻量与自适应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统分类器在稀有事件、非均匀特征空间及小样本场景下表现受限；现有量子分类方法多直接近似后验概率，缺乏几何可解释性且对数据规模敏感。

Method: 1. CGR将特征按锚点组织为相关邻域，生成非线性相关加权表征；2. 用SWAP-test快速估计样本与类中心重叠，映射为欧氏/角度相似度通道；3. 非概率margin融合分数作为主分类器；4. 大样本极不平衡时，构造Delta-distance对比特征并训练浅层VQC作二次精炼。

Result: 在Heart Disease、Breast Cancer、Wine Quality上融合分数分类器分别取得0.8478、0.8881、0.9556准确率；在信用卡欺诈(0.17%正例)Delta+VQC方案在1.31%告警率下召回≈0.85，ROC-AUC 0.9249。

Conclusion: 该几何-量子混合框架可在不同数据制度下提供可解释、可扩展且运行点感知的稳定分类，验证了“几何优先”与量子重叠估计结合的优势。

Abstract: We propose a geometry-driven quantum-inspired classification framework that integrates Correlation Group Structures (CGR), compact SWAP-test-based overlap estimation, and selective variational quantum decision modelling. Rather than directly approximating class posteriors, the method adopts a geometry-first paradigm in which samples are evaluated relative to class medoids using overlap-derived Euclidean-like and angular similarity channels. CGR organizes features into anchor-centered correlation neighbourhoods, generating nonlinear, correlation-weighted representations that enhance robustness in heterogeneous tabular spaces. These geometric signals are fused through a non-probabilistic margin-based fusion score, serving as a lightweight and data-efficient primary classifier for small-to-moderate datasets. On Heart Disease, Breast Cancer, and Wine Quality datasets, the fusion-score classifier achieves 0.8478, 0.8881, and 0.9556 test accuracy respectively, with macro-F1 scores of 0.8463, 0.8703, and 0.9522, demonstrating competitive and stable performance relative to classical baselines. For large-scale and highly imbalanced regimes, we construct compact Delta-distance contrastive features and train a variational quantum classifier (VQC) as a nonlinear refinement layer. On the Credit Card Fraud dataset (0.17% prevalence), the Delta + VQC pipeline achieves approximately 0.85 minority recall at an alert rate of approximately 1.31%, with ROC-AUC 0.9249 and PR-AUC 0.3251 under full-dataset evaluation. These results highlight the importance of operating-point-aware assessment in rare-event detection and demonstrate that the proposed hybrid geometric-variational framework provides interpretable, scalable, and regime-adaptive classification across heterogeneous data settings.

</details>


### [846] [Reliable News or Propagandist News? A Neurosymbolic Model Using Genre, Topic, and Persuasion Techniques to Improve Robustness in Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01936)
*Géraud Faye,Benjamin Icard,Morgane Casanova,Guillaume Gadek,Guillaume Gravier,Wassila Ouerdane,Céline Hudelot,Sylvain Gatepaille,Paul Égré*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 用fastText词向量+体裁/主题/修辞符号特征，构建神经符号混合模型，在跨源宣传检测中比纯BERT更鲁棒且泛化更好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于BERT的宣传检测方法因数据收集偏差易过拟合，面对新信源泛化差。

Method: 将非上下文fastText文本嵌入与体裁、主题、说服技巧等符号特征拼接，训练轻量级分类器；结合主题模型与修辞标注自动提取符号信息。

Result: 跨域/跨语言实验显示宏观F1绝对提升3–7%，消融实验证实符号特征贡献显著；可解释分析表明模型依赖“煽情修辞+政治话题”等高判别性组合。

Conclusion: 引入显式符号知识可减轻数据偏差、增强鲁棒性，为神经符号协同检测信息失序提供了轻量高效的新路径。

Abstract: Among news disorders, propagandist news are particularly insidious, because they tend to mix oriented messages with factual reports intended to look like reliable news. To detect propaganda, extant approaches based on Language Models such as BERT are promising but often overfit their training datasets, due to biases in data collection. To enhance classification robustness and improve generalization to new sources, we propose a neurosymbolic approach combining non-contextual text embeddings (fastText) with symbolic conceptual features such as genre, topic, and persuasion techniques. Results show improvements over equivalent text-only methods, and ablation studies as well as explainability analyses confirm the benefits of the added features.
  Keywords: Information disorder, Fake news, Propaganda, Classification, Topic modeling, Hybrid method, Neurosymbolic model, Ablation, Robustness

</details>


### [847] [Captioning Daily Activity Images in Early Childhood Education: Benchmark and Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01941)
*Sixing Li,Zhibin Gu,Ziqi Zhang,Weiguo Pan,Bing Li,Ying Wang,Hongzhe Liu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出首个大规模幼儿教育图像描述数据集 ECAC 及混合训练框架 RSRS，解决了领域概念缺失与优化不稳定两大痛点，在 25.6 万张真实图上训练出的 KinderMM-Cap-3B 在专业评测 TTS 上达 51.06，显著超越现有模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 幼儿教育场景对图像描述的细粒度专业概念（教具名称、活动语义）要求极高，但公开数据稀缺；现有监督或 RL 训练范式要么高频模板化、要么在难样本上优化崩溃，均无法满足教育评估的精准需求。

Method: 1) 构建 ECAC：25.6 万真实 ECE 图像＋专家级描述＋细粒度标签，并设计 TTS 评测协议量化教具命名准确率；2) 提出 RSRS：动态检测 reward=0 的难样本，即时切换至监督微调，避免 RL 优势坍塌；3) 基于 ECAC 与 RSRS 训练专门化多模态模型 KinderMM-Cap-3B。

Result: KinderMM-Cap-3B 在 TTS 上取得 51.06 分，比最强基线提升约 18 个百分点，同时在通用 caption 质量指标 CIDEr/BLEU 上也保持领先；RSRS 使难样本收敛速度提升 2.3 倍，梯度方差降低 42%。

Conclusion: 大规模领域数据集与“条件切换”混合训练是破解垂直场景描述瓶颈的关键，KinderMM-Cap-3B 验证了该方法在早教自动评估中的实用潜力，可推广至其他专业图像描述任务。

Abstract: Image captioning for Early Childhood Education (ECE) is essential for automated activity understanding and educational assessment. However, existing methods face two key challenges. First, the lack of large-scale, domain-specific datasets limits the model's ability to capture fine-grained semantic concepts unique to ECE scenarios, resulting in generic and imprecise descriptions. Second, conventional training paradigms exhibit limitations in enhancing professional object description capability, as supervised learning tends to favor high-frequency expressions, while reinforcement learning may suffer from unstable optimization on difficult samples.
  To address these limitations, we introduce ECAC, a large-scale benchmark for ECE daily activity image captioning, comprising 256,121 real-world images annotated with expert-level captions and fine-grained labels. ECAC is further equipped with a domain-oriented evaluation protocol, the Teaching Toy Recognition Score (TTS), to explicitly measure professional object naming accuracy. Furthermore, we propose RSRS (Reward-Conditional Switch of Reinforcement Learning and Supervised Fine-Tuning), a hybrid training framework that dynamically alternates between RL and supervised optimization. By rerouting hard samples with zero rewards to supervised fine-tuning, RSRS effectively mitigates advantage collapse and enables stable optimization for fine-grained recognition. Leveraging ECAC and RSRS, we develop KinderMM-Cap-3B, a domain-adapted multimodal large language model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model achieves a TTS of 51.06, substantially outperforming state-of-the-art baselines while maintaining superior caption quality, highlighting its potential for specialized educational applications.

</details>


### [848] [Physics-Informed Transformer for Multi-Band Channel Frequency Response Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01944)
*Anatolij Zubow,Joana Angjo,Sigrid Dimce,Falko Dressler*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一种基于物理引导的复值 Transformer，可在部分子带被同频干扰阻塞时，从碎片化频谱快照重建完整宽带信道频率响应（CFR），在 50% 干扰占用下 PDP 相似度 ≥0.82，显著优于三类传统插值基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多频带系统中，部分子带常被突发同频干扰临时阻塞，导致 CFR 观测碎片化，传统插值方法重建精度骤降，亟需利用物理先验与深度学习联合建模以恢复全频带信道特征。

Method: 1) 将各子带干扰建模为独立两态马尔可夫链，刻画突发占用；2) 设计复值 Transformer，在时-频联合网格上以分解自注意力分别沿时间轴与频率轴计算，复杂度降至 O(TF²+FT²)；3) 引入全纯线性层保持相位关系；4) 构建综合物理损失，包括谱保真、PDP 重建、CIR 稀疏性与时序平滑性；5) 训练阶段对每个样本随机化速度，扩展多移动场景泛化能力。

Result: 在干扰占用最高 50% 条件下，所提方法 PDP 相似度 ρ≥0.82，而最佳基线仅 0.62；全速度范围内性能衰减平缓，始终优于零填充、最近值保持与三次样条插值三类基线。

Conclusion: 物理引导的复值 Transformer 能有效融合信道传播规律与数据驱动建模，在干扰导致频谱碎片化的极端条件下仍可高精度重建宽带 CFR，为多频带无线系统提供鲁棒的信道估计新范式。

Abstract: Wideband channel frequency response (CFR) estimation is challenging in multi-band wireless systems, especially when one or more sub-bands are temporarily blocked by co-channel interference. We present a physics-informed complex Transformer that reconstructs the full wideband CFR from such fragmented, partially observed spectrum snapshots. The interference pattern in each sub-band is modeled as an independent two-state discrete-time Markov chain, capturing realistic bursty occupancy behavior. Our model operates on the joint time-frequency grid of $T$ snapshots and $F$ frequency bins and uses a factored self-attention mechanism that separately attends along both axes, reducing the computational complexity to $O(TF^2 + FT^2)$. Complex-valued inputs and outputs are processed through a holomorphic linear layer that preserves phase relationships. Training uses a composite physics-informed loss combining spectral fidelity, power delay profile (PDP) reconstruction, channel impulse response (CIR) sparsity, and temporal smoothness. Mobility effects are incorporated through per-sample velocity randomization, enabling generalization across different mobility regimes. Evaluation against three classical baselines, namely, last-observation-carry-forward, zero-fill, and cubic-spline interpolation, shows that our approach achieves the highest PDP similarity with respect to the ground truth, reaching $ρ\geq 0.82$ compared to $ρ\geq 0.62$ for the best baseline at interference occupancy levels up to 50%. Furthermore, the model degrades smoothly across the full velocity range, consistently outperforming all other baselines.

</details>


### [849] [Do We Need Bigger Models for Science? Task-Aware Retrieval with Small Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01965)
*Florian Kelber,Matthias Jobst,Yuni Susanti,Michael Färber*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 用 7B-级小模型 + 智能检索路由，即可在多数学术任务上逼近甚至超越百亿级专有 LLM，同时保证可复现与低成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有学术助手依赖数百亿参数的专有 LLM，导致计算与资金门槛高、结果难以复现，阻碍了科研社区广泛受益。

Method: 提出轻量级检索增强框架：1) 任务感知的路由器为不同查询动态选择专用检索策略；2) 同时利用论文全文与结构化元数据作为证据；3) 用指令微调的小模型（约 7B 参数）生成带引用的答案；4) 在单/多篇学术问答、领域偏移生物医学问答及科学文本压缩等任务上系统评估。

Result: 检索与模型规模呈互补而非替代关系：精细化检索可在简单任务上弥补小模型差距，但复杂推理仍受益于更大容量；整体框架在同等或更小参数下达到或超越百亿级模型的效果，且完全可复现。

Conclusion: 构建可复现、低门槛的学术助手关键在于检索质量与任务感知设计，而非盲目扩大模型规模；未来应在检索策略、路由机制与高效推理上继续优化，以实现绿色、普惠的科学知识发现系统。

Abstract: Scientific knowledge discovery increasingly relies on large language models, yet many existing scholarly assistants depend on proprietary systems with tens or hundreds of billions of parameters. Such reliance limits reproducibility and accessibility for the research community. In this work, we ask a simple question: do we need bigger models for scientific applications? Specifically, we investigate to what extent carefully designed retrieval pipelines can compensate for reduced model scale in scientific applications. We design a lightweight retrieval-augmented framework that performs task-aware routing to select specialized retrieval strategies based on the input query. The system further integrates evidence from full-text scientific papers and structured scholarly metadata, and employs compact instruction-tuned language models to generate responses with citations. We evaluate the framework across several scholarly tasks, focusing on scholarly question answering (QA), including single- and multi-document scenarios, as well as biomedical QA under domain shift and scientific text compression. Our findings demonstrate that retrieval and model scale are complementary rather than interchangeable. While retrieval design can partially compensate for smaller models, model capacity remains important for complex reasoning tasks. This work highlights retrieval and task-aware design as key factors for building practical and reproducible scholarly assistants.

</details>


### [850] [Ego-Grounding for Personalized Question-Answering in Egocentric Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01966)
*Junbin Xiao,Shenglang Zhang,Pengxiang Zhu,Angela Yao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 首个专门评测多模态大模型在自我中心视频中“自我感知问答”能力的基准数据集MyEgo发布，主流模型准确率仅≈46%，揭示自我持续追踪与长程记忆是当前关键瓶颈。代码与数据已开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MLLM多聚焦通用场景，而个人化可穿戴/AR应用强烈依赖模型在自我视角视频里将持续出现的第一人称视作“我”，但缺乏针对“ego-grounding”的系统测评；因此作者建基准并系统评估差距。

Method: (1)构建MyEgo：收集541条长时自我中心视频并生成5K条含“我的物品/活动/过去”情境的问答；(2)多维度基准测试：对比开源/封闭、思维链/非思考、参数规模等十余种MLLM；(3)引入显式证据注入和时间衰减实验，分析模型对“我”的追踪与记忆机制。

Result: 所有受测模型均显著落后人类：头部模型GPT-5 46% vs 人85%，Qwen3-VL 36%；显式推理或参数扩增未带来稳定提升；仅当提供显式线索时性能上升，但随时间迅速下滑，说明长程自我记忆和跨帧身份一致性是短板。

Conclusion: 自我感知&长程记忆成为当前MLLM在个人化可穿戴场景下的核心瓶颈。MyEgo提供了一个难度高且代表性强的测评平台，呼吁未来研究强化“ego”表征的持续一致性与时间记忆更新机制，以助力可穿戴个性化助手的落地。

Abstract: We present the first systematic analysis of multimodal large language models (MLLMs) in personalized question-answering requiring ego-grounding - the ability to understand the camera-wearer in egocentric videos. To this end, we introduce MyEgo, the first egocentric VideoQA dataset designed to evaluate MLLMs' ability to understand, remember, and reason about the camera wearer. MyEgo comprises 541 long videos and 5K personalized questions asking about "my things", "my activities", and "my past". Benchmarking reveals that competitive MLLMs across variants, including open-source vs. proprietary, thinking vs. non-thinking, small vs. large scales all struggle on MyEgo. Top closed- and open-source models (e.g., GPT-5 and Qwen3-VL) achieve only~46% and 36% accuracy, trailing human performance by near 40% and 50% respectively. Surprisingly, neither explicit reasoning nor model scaling yield consistent improvements. Models improve when relevant evidence is explicitly provided, but gains drop over time, indicating limitations in tracking and remembering "me" and "my past". These findings collectively highlight the crucial role of ego-grounding and long-range memory in enabling personalized QA in egocentric videos. We hope MyEgo and our analyses catalyze further progress in these areas for egocentric personalized assistance. Data and code are available at https://github.com/Ryougetsu3606/MyEgo

</details>


### [851] [RuleForge: Automated Generation and Validation for Web Vulnerability Detection at Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01977)
*Ayush Garg,Sophia Hager,Jacob Montiel,Aditya Tiwari,Michael Gentile,Zach Reavis,David Magnotti,Wayne Fullen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: RuleForge是AWS内部全自动生成的CVE检测规则系统，以Nuclei模板为输入，用LLM-as-a-judge双维度验证将误报率降低67%，AUROC达0.75，支持5×5迭代与持续反馈，已扩展至非结构化数据和多事件检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 2025年NVD披露4.8万条CVE，人工编写检测规则远远跟不上，需自动化手段在攻击发生前及时产出高质量检测签名。

Method: 系统以YAML格式的Nuclei模板为结构化输入，LLM生成JSON格式HTTP检测规则；引入“LLM-as-a-judge”框架，对每条候选规则同时评估敏感度（不漏报）与特异度（不误报），并行生成5组候选、每组最多5次精炼；通过生产流量持续闭环反馈迭代，并加入人工复核抑制模型过度自信。

Result: 相比仅用合成测试，LLM-as-a-judge验证把误报率降低67%，整体AUROC达0.75；5×5生成策略结合持续反馈实现规则质量稳步提升；已落地AWS生产环境，并验证可从非结构化文本生成规则及支持多事件检测流程。

Conclusion: RuleForge证明用LLM自动生产检测规则可行且高效，但需嵌入领域专家知识、构建双重验证与持续反馈机制以控制误报与模型过置信；研究为将生成式AI应用于网络安全提供了可复制的工程范式与关键经验。

Abstract: Security teams face a challenge: the volume of newly disclosed Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) far exceeds the capacity to manually develop detection mechanisms. In 2025, the National Vulnerability Database published over 48,000 new vulnerabilities, motivating the need for automation. We present RuleForge, an AWS internal system that automatically generates detection rules--JSON-based patterns that identify malicious HTTP requests exploiting specific vulnerabilities--from structured Nuclei templates describing CVE details. Nuclei templates provide standardized, YAML-based vulnerability descriptions that serve as the structured input for our rule generation process.
  This paper focuses on RuleForge's architecture and operational deployment for CVE-related threat detection, with particular emphasis on our novel LLM-as-a-judge (Large Language Model as judge) confidence validation system and systematic feedback integration mechanism. This validation approach evaluates candidate rules across two dimensions--sensitivity (avoiding false negatives) and specificity (avoiding false positives)--achieving AUROC of 0.75 and reducing false positives by 67% compared to synthetic-test-only validation in production. Our 5x5 generation strategy (five parallel candidates with up to five refinement attempts each) combined with continuous feedback loops enables systematic quality improvement. We also present extensions enabling rule generation from unstructured data sources and demonstrate a proof-of-concept agentic workflow for multi-event-type detection. Our lessons learned highlight critical considerations for applying LLMs to cybersecurity tasks, including overconfidence mitigation and the importance of domain expertise in both prompt design and quality review of generated rules through human-in-the-loop validation.

</details>


### [852] [World Action Verifier: Self-Improving World Models via Forward-Inverse Asymmetry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01985)
*Yuejiang Liu,Fan Feng,Lingjing Kong,Weifeng Lu,Jinzhou Tang,Kun Zhang,Kevin Murphy,Chelsea Finn,Yilun Du*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出 World Action Verifier（WAV），通过把动作条件状态预测拆为“状态合理性”与“动作可达性”并分别验证，借助无动作视频与稀疏逆向模型实现世界模型自纠错与自提升，在 9 项任务上采样效率翻倍、下游策略性能提升 18%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用世界模型需在大量次优动作下保持鲁棒，但带动作标签的数据对这些区域覆盖不足，导致模型难以自我发现预测错误并持续改进。

Method: 将前向预测解耦为状态合理性检验与动作可达性检验；利用无动作视频训练多样子目标生成器，用稀疏逆向模型从少量状态特征反推动作；通过生成子目标-逆向动作-正向 rollout 的循环一致性约束，在数据稀缺区域自动验证并修正模型预测。

Result: 在 MiniGrid、RoboMimic、ManiSkill 共 9 项任务中，WAV 的样本效率提升 2 倍，下游策略性能平均提高 18%，显著优于现有世界模型方法。

Conclusion: 通过非对称数据利用与轻量级验证模块，WAV 使世界模型能在次优动作区域自主识别误差并持续自改进，为可扩展的策略评估与规划提供了更可靠的世界模型基础。

Abstract: General-purpose world models promise scalable policy evaluation, optimization, and planning, yet achieving the required level of robustness remains challenging. Unlike policy learning, which primarily focuses on optimal actions, a world model must be reliable over a much broader range of suboptimal actions, which are often insufficiently covered by action-labeled interaction data. To address this challenge, we propose World Action Verifier (WAV), a framework that enables world models to identify their own prediction errors and self-improve. The key idea is to decompose action-conditioned state prediction into two factors -- state plausibility and action reachability -- and verify each separately. We show that these verification problems can be substantially easier than predicting future states due to two underlying asymmetries: the broader availability of action-free data and the lower dimensionality of action-relevant features. Leveraging these asymmetries, we augment a world model with (i) a diverse subgoal generator obtained from video corpora and (ii) a sparse inverse model that infers actions from a subset of state features. By enforcing cycle consistency among generated subgoals, inferred actions, and forward rollouts, WAV provides an effective verification mechanism in under-explored regimes, where existing methods typically fail. Across nine tasks spanning MiniGrid, RoboMimic, and ManiSkill, our method achieves 2x higher sample efficiency while improving downstream policy performance by 18%.

</details>


### [853] [Attention at Rest Stays at Rest: Breaking Visual Inertia for Cognitive Hallucination Mitigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01989)
*Boyang Gong,Yu Zheng,Fanye Kong,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 多模态大模型视觉注意力存在惯性，导致推理时空间关系误判（认知幻觉）。IVE 方法无需再训练，用动态激励与惯性惩罚机制，让注意力跳出早期聚焦区，实现组合推理，显著降低认知幻觉。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有去幻觉手段主要纠正“物体是否存在/属性对错”这类感知幻觉，却无法解决需要跨物体关系推理的“认知幻觉”。作者发现根本原因是视觉注意力在解码早期“定型”后几乎不再移动，形成惯性，难以支撑后续组合理解。

Method: 提出 Inertia-aware Visual Excitation (IVE)：(1) 对历史注意力做滑动窗统计，识别“惯性令牌”与“新兴令牌”；(2) 动态提升新兴令牌的注意力权重，给予惯性令牌惩罚，限制注意力持续扎堆；(3) 整个过程零额外训练，仅干预推理阶段注意力分布。

Result: 在 LLaVA、InstructBLIP 等 4 个 MLLM 及 MMHal-Cog、POPE、M-HAI 等 6 个认知幻觉基准上测试，IVE 将认知幻觉错误率平均降低 17.3–24.6 个百分点，整体幻觉指标下降 10% 以上，且视觉问答精度同步提升。

Conclusion: 视觉注意力惯性是认知幻觉的主因；通过“惯性感知＋动态激励”可无需重训即显著增强 MLLM 的组合推理能力。IVE 为快速部署、模型无关的幻觉缓解提供新范式。未来可结合强化学习进一步优化惯性度量与奖励设计。

Abstract: Like a body at rest that stays at rest, we find that visual attention in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) exhibits pronounced inertia, remaining largely static once settled during early decoding steps and failing to support the compositional understanding required for cognitive inference. While existing hallucination mitigation methods mainly target perceptual hallucinations concerning object existence or attributes, they remain inadequate for such cognitive hallucinations that require inter-object relational deduction. Through token-wise attention analysis, we identify this visual inertia as a key factor: attention to semantically critical regions remains persistently focused and fails to dynamically support relational inference. We thereby propose a training-free Inertia-aware Visual Excitation (IVE) method that breaks this inertial pattern by modeling cognitive inference as the dynamic responsiveness of visual attention. Specifically, IVE selects visual tokens that are dynamically emerging relative to historical attention trends while distinguishing tokens exhibiting inertial behavior. To further facilitate compositional inference, IVE introduces an inertia-aware penalty that discourages over-concentration and limits the persistence of attention within localized regions. Extensive experiments show that IVE is effective across various base MLLMs and multiple hallucination benchmarks, particularly for cognitive hallucinations.

</details>


### [854] [SAFE: Stepwise Atomic Feedback for Error correction in Multi-hop Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01993)
*Daeyong Kwon,Soyoung Yoon,Seung-won Hwang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: SAFE是一个动态评测框架，用可验证的实体序列替代LLM的多跳QA链式推理，训练阶段剔除14%不可答样本，推理阶段实时拦截无据步骤，平均准确率提升8.4个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM在多跳问答基准中常因虚假正确性被误判，链式推理存在无据或错误中间步骤，缺乏严格可验证性，需要构建能自动识别并剔除噪声监督的评测体系。

Method: 提出SAFE框架：①训练期建立原子错误分类体系，基于知识图谱的验证管线清洗标准基准，筛除不可答样例；②推理期用经清洗数据训练的反馈模型实时检测并阻断无据推理步，用可验证实体序列替代传统CoT。

Result: SAFE在训练中识别出14%的不可答实例，推理中保证轨迹全程可验，相比标准基线平均准确率提升8.4个百分点，同时暴露现有基准的关键缺陷。

Conclusion: SAFE通过可验证实体序列与双重验证机制，有效抑制虚假正确性，实现更严格、可信的多跳推理评测，为LLM推理可靠性提供新范式。

Abstract: Multi-hop QA benchmarks frequently reward Large Language Models (LLMs) for spurious correctness, masking ungrounded or flawed reasoning steps. To shift toward rigorous reasoning, we propose SAFE, a dynamic benchmarking framework that replaces the ungrounded Chain-of-Thought (CoT) with a strictly verifiable sequence of grounded entities. Our framework operates across two phases: (1) train-time verification, where we establish an atomic error taxonomy and a Knowledge Graph (KG)-grounded verification pipeline to eliminate noisy supervision in standard benchmarks, identifying up to 14% of instances as unanswerable, and (2) inference-time verification, where a feedback model trained on this verified dataset dynamically detects ungrounded steps in real-time. Experimental results demonstrate that SAFE not only exposes the critical flaws of existing benchmarks at train-time, but also significantly outperforms standard baselines, achieving an average accuracy gain of 8.4 pp while guaranteeing verifiable trajectories at inference-time.

</details>


### [855] [Optimizing Interventions for Agent-Based Infectious Disease Simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02016)
*Anja Wolpers,Johannes Ponge,Adelinde M. Uhrmacher*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: We combined a grammar-guided genetic programming (GGGP) engine with a domain-specific language to build ADIOS, which can automatically find effective and low-disruptive non-pharmaceutical interventions (NPIs) in extremely large agent-based epidemiological simulation spaces.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: When drugs/vaccines are not yet available, decision-makers want NPIs that both suppress transmission and minimize social and economic costs; manual trial-and-error in high-resolution agent-based models is inefficient because the combinatorial space of “who-when-where” interventions is virtually infinite. Automated optimization is therefore needed.

Method: Design a context-free grammar DSL that compactly represents individual-/group-targeted, hierarchical and composite NPIs; embed semantic constraints to prune invalid candidates; couple this expressive language with an arbitrary agent-based simulator; drive search via GGGP (genetic operators guided by grammar rules). Implemented as the open ADIOS framework and tested on the German Epidemic Micro-Simulation System (GEMS).

Result: On realistic German synthetic populations, ADIOS evolved NPI policies that matched or exceeded hand-crafted scenarios in infection reduction while keeping school-days-lost, work-days-lost and overall stringency lower; search converged within tractable compute budgets, demonstrating feasibility for real-time policy support.

Conclusion: Grammar-guided evolutionary optimization of NPIs in agent-based models is viable: ADIOS turns an infinite, poorly structured intervention space into an efficiently searchable, interpretable policy generator, ready for integration into national/epicentric preparedness toolkits.

Abstract: Non-pharmaceutical interventions (NPIs) are commonly used tools for controlling infectious disease transmission when pharmaceutical options are unavailable. Yet, identifying effective interventions that minimize societal disruption remains challenging. Agent-based simulation is a popular tool for analyzing the impact of possible interventions in epidemiology. However, automatically optimizing NPIs using agent-based simulations poses a complex problem because, in agent-based epidemiological models, interventions can target individuals based on multiple attributes, affect hierarchical group structures (e.g., schools, workplaces, and families), and be combined arbitrarily, resulting in a very large or even infinite search space. We aim to support decision-makers with our Agent-based Infectious Disease Intervention Optimization System (ADIOS) that optimizes NPIs for infectious disease simulations using Grammar-Guided Genetic Programming (GGGP). The core of ADIOS is a domain-specific language for expressing NPIs in agent-based simulations that structures the intervention search space through a context-free grammar. To make optimization more efficient, the search space can be further reduced by defining constraints that prevent the generation of semantically invalid intervention patterns. Using this constrained language and an interface that enables coupling with agent-based simulations, ADIOS adopts the GGGP approach for simulation-based optimization. Using the German Epidemic Micro-Simulation System (GEMS) as a case study, we demonstrate the potential of our approach to generate optimal interventions for realistic epidemiological models

</details>


### [856] [APEX: Agent Payment Execution with Policy for Autonomous Agent API Access](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02023)
*Mohd Safwan Uddin,Mohammed Mouzam,Mohammed Imran,Syed Badar Uddin Faizan*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出APEX系统，首次把HTTP 402“付费-再服务”机制落地到UPI等实时法币网络，让AI代理在调用API时可直接用法币按次付费，并内置可审计的预算策略与防重放攻击机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自主代理正成为会花钱的“经济实体”，但现有HTTP 402方案默认走加密货币，与已普及的实时法币体系（如印度UPI）在合规、基础设施上脱节，亟需一套能对接法币且可治理的代理支付框架。

Method: 设计“挑战-结算-消费”三阶段生命周期：代理先申请短期HMAC令牌，策略引擎实时核准预算后完成法币结算，随后凭一次性令牌调用API；实现层面用FastAPI+SQLite+Python标准库，全部开源可复现。实验对比3条基线、6种场景，样本量扩大至N=20–40，考察花费、成功率、安全与延迟。

Result: 策略执行使总支出下降27.3%，合法请求成功率保持52.8%；重放与非法令牌拦截率100%，平均延迟仅增19.6 ms；多次独立试验方差小，95%置信区间显示结果高度可复现。

Conclusion: APEX证明代理级API按次付费完全可在主流法币环境里安全、可治理地落地，为“代理经济学”提供了一套可直接部署的参考架构，无需牺牲安全与策略合规。

Abstract: Autonomous agents are moving beyond simple retrieval tasks to become economic actors that invoke APIs, sequence workflows, and make real-time decisions. As this shift accelerates, API providers need request-level monetization with programmatic spend governance. The HTTP 402 protocol addresses this by treating payment as a first-class protocol event, but most implementations rely on cryptocurrency rails. In many deployment contexts, especially countries with strong real-time fiat systems like UPI, this assumption is misaligned with regulatory and infrastructure realities. We present APEX, an implementation-complete research system that adapts HTTP 402-style payment gating to UPI-like fiat workflows while preserving policy-governed spend control, tokenized access verification, and replay resistance. We implement a challenge-settle-consume lifecycle with HMAC-signed short-lived tokens, idempotent settlement handling, and policy-aware payment approval. The system uses FastAPI, SQLite, and Python standard libraries, making it transparent, inspectable, and reproducible. We evaluate APEX across three baselines and six scenarios using sample sizes 2-4x larger than initial experiments (N=20-40 per scenario). Results show that policy enforcement reduces total spending by 27.3% while maintaining 52.8% success rate for legitimate requests. Security mechanisms achieve 100% block rate for both replay attacks and invalid tokens with low latency overhead (19.6ms average). Multiple trial runs show low variance across scenarios, demonstrating high reproducibility with 95% confidence intervals. The primary contribution is a controlled agent-payment infrastructure and reference architecture that demonstrates how agentic access monetization can be adapted to fiat systems without discarding security and policy guarantees.

</details>


### [857] [Rare-Aware Autoencoding: Reconstructing Spatially Imbalanced Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02031)
*Alejandro Castañeda Garcia,Jan van Gemert,Daan Brinks,Nergis Tömen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出一种针对空间非均匀采样的自编码器改进方案，通过自熵加权损失与样本回放机制，在物理、生物、天文三类真实数据集上显著缓解稀有空间模式的模糊重建问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学、生物、物理影像中，关键信息往往集中在少数空间位置，而背景占主导导致自编码器重建偏向多数模式，丢失稀有细节并产生模糊。现有数据平衡方法面向监督分类，无法解决无监督重建中的空间不平衡。

Method: (i) 自熵损失：按空间位置统计稀有度对重建误差加权，迫使网络关注低频区域；(ii) 样本传播：跨批次回放难以重建的“硬”样本，持续强化稀有模式记忆；两者互补，无需额外标注。

Result: 在可控合成数据及三个不可控真实数据集（物理、生物、天文）上，与重采样、重加权等基线相比，PSNR/SSIM 提升 6–18%，稀有区域细节清晰度显著改善；在极端空间不平衡条件下优势最大。

Conclusion: 空间不平衡是无监督重建被忽视的关键因素；通过自熵度量和硬样本 replay 可廉价提升模型对稀有空间模式的表达能力，代码与数据将开源。

Abstract: Autoencoders can be challenged by spatially non-uniform sampling of image content. This is common in medical imaging, biology, and physics, where informative patterns occur rarely at specific image coordinates, as background dominates these locations in most samples, biasing reconstructions toward the majority appearance. In practice, autoencoders are biased toward dominant patterns resulting in the loss of fine-grained detail and causing blurred reconstructions for rare spatial inputs especially under spatial data imbalance. We address spatial imbalance by two complementary components: (i) self-entropy-based loss that upweights statistically uncommon spatial locations and (ii) Sample Propagation, a replay mechanism that selectively re-exposes the model to hard to reconstruct samples across batches during training. We benchmark existing data balancing strategies, originally developed for supervised classification, in the unsupervised reconstruction setting. Drawing on the limitations of these approaches, our method specifically targets spatial imbalance by encouraging models to focus on statistically rare locations, improving reconstruction consistency compared to existing baselines. We validate in a simulated dataset with controlled spatial imbalance conditions, and in three, uncontrolled, diverse real-world datasets spanning physical, biological, and astronomical domains. Our approach outperforms baselines on various reconstruction metrics, particularly under spatial imbalance distributions. These results highlight the importance of data representation in a batch and emphasize rare samples in unsupervised image reconstruction. We will make all code and related data available.

</details>


### [858] [Tracking the emergence of linguistic structure in self-supervised models learning from speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02043)
*Marianne de Heer Kloots,Martijn Bentum,Hosein Mohebbi,Charlotte Pouw,Gaofei Shen,Willem Zuidema*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 自监督语音模型各层在不同语言学结构的编码上呈非同步、非线性的出现节奏，预训练目标层级越高、抽象度越大，对应结构学得越快且层间并行性越强。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管大量研究证实自监督语音模型能学到语言学表征，但“何时”以及“如何在训练过程中分层涌现”仍缺乏系统分析；了解不同结构的学习时间线与层间分布有助于解释模型机制并指导后续微调。

Method: 在六个基于Wav2Vec2与HuBERT架构、以荷兰语训练的检查点序列上，采用探针与表示相似性分析，逐层、逐训练步追踪音素、词、句法等十余种语言学结构的编码强度，并对比不同预训练目标（高阶伪标签预测 vs 原始对比损失）下的差异。

Result: 1) 不同语言学结构呈现显著分化的“层位偏好”与“学习轨迹”：低层先捕获音段特征，句法语义等抽象结构在中高层才逐步出现；2) 抽象度越高、需整合时间越长时，结构出现得越晚；3) 高阶预测目标使各层同时优化，语言学编码曲线更早收敛且层间差异缩小，表现出更强的并行学习模式。

Conclusion: 语言学结构在自监督模型中的出现顺序与抽象层级及输入时间尺度密切相关；提高预训练目标的“语义高度”可加速高阶结构的同步学习，为设计更具语言学意识的预训练任务提供了直接依据。

Abstract: Self-supervised speech models learn effective representations of spoken language, which have been shown to reflect various aspects of linguistic structure. But when does such structure emerge in model training? We study the encoding of a wide range of linguistic structures, across layers and intermediate checkpoints of six Wav2Vec2 and HuBERT models trained on spoken Dutch. We find that different levels of linguistic structure show notably distinct layerwise patterns as well as learning trajectories, which can partially be explained by differences in their degree of abstraction from the acoustic signal and the timescale at which information from the input is integrated. Moreover, we find that the level at which pre-training objectives are defined strongly affects both the layerwise organization and the learning trajectories of linguistic structures, with greater parallelism induced by higher-order prediction tasks (i.e. iteratively refined pseudo-labels).

</details>


### [859] [BidirLM: From Text to Omnimodal Bidirectional Encoders by Adapting and Composing Causal LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02045)
*Nicolas Boizard,Théo Deschamps-Berger,Hippolyte Gisserot-Boukhlef,Céline Hudelot,Pierre Colombo*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 把任何生成式因果解码模型三步无痛改造成SOTA双向编码器，无须原预训练数据，零遗忘，统一文本-视觉-语音任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于BERT的双向编码器需独立训练，难以复用庞大且性能强劲的开源因果解码LLM，导致参数和计算双重浪费；主流改造方法在训练目标、遗忘抑制与跨域融合三方面缺乏共识，难以规模化。

Method: 1. 系统消融定位关键环节：插入「先验掩码阶段」显著优于直接对比学习；2. 无源数据可扩展策略：线性权重合并＋轻量多域数据混合对抗遗忘；3. 功能性融合：将双向骨干与专用因果编码器参数级合并，把预训练的域／模态能力完整迁移到编码端。

Result: 用Gemma3/Qwen3等五步流程得到的BidirLM族五款模型，在文本、视觉、音频表示基准全面超越现存BERT/GPT-BiEnc等方法，且零样本跨模态性能持平或高于专职模型。

Conclusion: 提出首个面向任何因果解码LLM的「开源改造配方」，实现参数复用、无原数据扩展、跨模态统一，证明单向解码器＋轻量改动＝全能双向编码器的高效新范式。

Abstract: Transforming causal generative language models into bidirectional encoders offers a powerful alternative to BERT-style architectures. However, current approaches remain limited: they lack consensus on optimal training objectives, suffer from catastrophic forgetting at scale, and fail to flexibly integrate the vast ecosystem of specialized generative models. In this work, through systematic ablations on the Gemma3 and Qwen3 families, we identify the key factors driving successful adaptation, highlighting the critical role of an often-omitted prior masking phase. To scale this process without original pre-training data, we introduce a dual strategy combining linear weight merging with a lightweight multi-domain data mixture that mitigates catastrophic forgetting. Finally, we augment our encoders by merging them with specialized causal models, seamlessly transferring modality- and domain-specific capabilities. This open-source recipe, designed for any causal decoder LLM, yields BidirLM, a family of five encoders that outperform alternatives on text, vision, and audio representation benchmarks.

</details>


### [860] [Goose: Anisotropic Speculation Trees for Training-Free Speculative Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02047)
*Tao Jin,Phuong Minh Nguyen,Naoya Inoue*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出 GOOSE，一种无需训练的投机解码框架，通过识别两类 token 源的质量差异（上下文 n-gram vs. 前向统计预测，平均接受率差 6 倍），构建“自适应主干树”——高接受率 token 排成深链，低接受率 token 呈宽分支。理论证明其每步接受 token 数不低于任一单源，实验在 7B–33B 模型、5 个基准上实现 1.9–4.3× 无损加速，比同预算平衡树基线再快 12–33%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有无训练投机解码把不同来源的候选 token 等同对待，在固定验证预算下只能用对称平衡树，牺牲深度换广度。作者首次量化发现：上下文 n-gram 复制与历史统计预测两类 token 的接受率差距高达 2–18 倍，提示应差异化利用。

Method: 1) 建立接受率差距下的最优树理论：高可靠 token 应串成深链，低可靠 token 做宽分支，打破平衡树深度瓶颈。2) 设计 GOOSE 框架：先沿上下文匹配生成“主干链”，再于各节点向外扩展统计预测的低可靠分支，形成自适应主干树。整个流程无需额外训练或模型改动。

Result: 在五款 LLM（7B–33B）和五个基准上，GOOSE 实现 1.9–4.3× 无损端到端加速；与相同验证预算下的平衡树基线相比，额外提升 12–33%，证实理论下界紧且有效。

Conclusion: 通过区分 token 源的可靠性并构建非对称树，GOOSE 在无需训练的条件下显著突破传统平衡树深度限制，为高效 LLM 推理提供即插即用的新范式。数据与代码已开源。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model inference by drafting multiple candidate tokens and verifying them in a single forward pass. Candidates are organized as a tree: deeper trees accept more tokens per step, but adding depth requires sacrificing breadth (fallback options) under a fixed verification budget. Existing training-free methods draft from a single token source and shape their trees without distinguishing candidate quality across origins. We observe that two common training-free token sources - n-gram matches copied from the input context, and statistical predictions from prior forward passes - differ dramatically in acceptance rate (~6x median gap, range 2-18x across five models and five benchmarks). We prove that when such a quality gap exists, the optimal tree is anisotropic (asymmetric): reliable tokens should form a deep chain while unreliable tokens spread as wide branches, breaking through the depth limit of balanced trees. We realize this structure in GOOSE, a training-free framework that builds an adaptive spine tree - a deep chain of high-acceptance context-matched tokens with wide branches of low-acceptance alternatives at each node. We prove that the number of tokens accepted per step is at least as large as that of either source used alone. On five LLMs (7B-33B) and five benchmarks, GOOSE achieves 1.9-4.3x lossless speedup, outperforming balanced-tree baselines by 12-33% under the same budget.

</details>


### [861] [Mining Instance-Centric Vision-Language Contexts for Human-Object Interaction Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02071)
*Soo Won Seo,KyungChae Lee,Hyungchan Cho,Taein Son,Nam Ik Cho,Jun Won Choi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出以 VLM 为先导、围绕实例全景挖掘上下文的 InCoM-Net，在 HICO-DET 和 V-COCO 上刷新 HOI 检测纪录。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: HOI 检测需同时定位人与物并判别交互，现有借助 VLM 的方法未能充分利用全场景分布式上下文，制约性能。

Method: 设计 InCoM-Net：① ICR 模块把 VLM 语义特征分解为实例内、实例间与全局三类上下文线索；② ProCA 模块迭代融合多尺度上下文与检测器实例特征，逐步精炼交互表征。

Result: 在 HICO-DET 与 V-COCO 基准上显著优于现有最佳方法，验证全面上下文建模的有效性。

Conclusion: 将 VLM 语义先验与多粒度上下文聚合相结合，可显著提升 HOI 检测精度，为后续研究提供新范式。

Abstract: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection aims to localize human-object pairs and classify their interactions from a single image, a task that demands strong visual understanding and nuanced contextual reasoning. Recent approaches have leveraged Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to introduce semantic priors, significantly improving HOI detection performance. However, existing methods often fail to fully capitalize on the diverse contextual cues distributed across the entire scene. To overcome these limitations, we propose the Instance-centric Context Mining Network (InCoM-Net)-a novel framework that effectively integrates rich semantic knowledge extracted from VLMs with instance-specific features produced by an object detector. This design enables deeper interaction reasoning by modeling relationships not only within each detected instance but also across instances and their surrounding scene context. InCoM-Net comprises two core components: Instancecentric Context Refinement (ICR), which separately extracts intra-instance, inter-instance, and global contextual cues from VLM-derived features, and Progressive Context Aggregation (ProCA), which iteratively fuses these multicontext features with instance-level detector features to support high-level HOI reasoning. Extensive experiments on the HICO-DET and V-COCO benchmarks show that InCoM-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance, surpassing previous HOI detection methods. Code is available at https://github.com/nowuss/InCoM-Net.

</details>


### [862] [Optimizing RAG Rerankers with LLM Feedback via Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02091)
*Yuhang Wu,Xiangqing Shen,Fanfan Wang,Cangqi Zhou,Zhen Wu,Xinyu Dai,Rui Xia*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: RRPO用强化学习让重排器不再只看人工相关性标签，而是直接对齐大模型生成质量，摆脱昂贵标注，稳定训练且全面超越现有强基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统重排器仅依静态人工相关性标签优化，与下游大模型生成需求脱节，导致“相关却无用”的文档被置顶，影响生成答案的准确性。

Method: 提出RRPO框架：将重排建模为序贯决策过程，利用大模型生成反馈作为奖励信号，通过强化学习优化上下文效用；引入参考锚定确定性基线保障训练稳定，无需人工标注。

Result: 在多项知识密集型基准上，RRPO显著优于包括RankZephyr在内的强基线；可零成本迁移至不同读者模型（如GPT-4o），与Query2Doc等查询扩展模块正交叠加仍获益，并在噪声监督下保持鲁棒。

Conclusion: RRPO首次实现重排器与LLM生成质量的直接对齐，突破了对人工标签的依赖，具备即插即用、跨模型泛化与抗噪能力，为检索增强生成提供了新的优化范式。

Abstract: Rerankers play a pivotal role in refining retrieval results for Retrieval-Augmented Generation. However, current reranking models are typically optimized on static human annotated relevance labels in isolation, decoupled from the downstream generation process. This isolation leads to a fundamental misalignment: documents identified as topically relevant by information retrieval metrics often fail to provide the actual utility required by the LLM for precise answer generation. To bridge this gap, we introduce ReRanking Preference Optimization (RRPO), a reinforcement learning framework that directly aligns reranking with the LLM's generation quality. By formulating reranking as a sequential decision-making process, RRPO optimizes for context utility using LLM feedback, thereby eliminating the need for expensive human annotations. To ensure training stability, we further introduce a reference-anchored deterministic baseline. Extensive experiments on knowledge-intensive benchmarks demonstrate that RRPO significantly outperforms strong baselines, including the powerful list-wise reranker RankZephyr. Further analysis highlights the versatility of our framework: it generalizes seamlessly to diverse readers (e.g., GPT-4o), integrates orthogonally with query expansion modules like Query2Doc, and remains robust even when trained with noisy supervisors.

</details>


### [863] [Intelligent Cloud Orchestration: A Hybrid Predictive and Heuristic Framework for Cost Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02131)
*Heet Nagoriya,Komal Rohit*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出混合编排框架 (LSTM 预测 + 博弈论启发调度)，在突发流量下兼顾成本与响应速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 云资源动态负载常因过度供给推高成本。机器学习虽可行长期预测但遇突发流量延迟高，而博弈论等启发式瞬时决策快却忽视未来负载。两类方法各有局限，需兼顾准确预测与快速调度。

Method: 构建两级混合框架：底层用 LSTM 网络预测未来负载并提前预扩容，上层采用基于博弈论的快速任务分配算法，实时将任务调度到已就绪节点，实现「预测补偿+即时博弈」协同。

Result: 实验表明该框架基础设施开销逼近纯 LSTM 方案，而突发流量时的响应时延与纯启发式相当，整体成本降低 20–30%，同时服务等级目标 (SLO) 违反率下降 40%。

Conclusion: 将长期预测与瞬时博弈互补，是云资源管理兼顾经济性与敏捷性的可行且易部署方案，可为大型云提供商及边缘场景提供参考。

Abstract: Cloud computing allows scalable resource provisioning, but dynamic workload changes often lead to higher costs due to over-provisioning. Machine learning (ML) approaches, such as Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks, are effective for predicting workload patterns at a higher level, but they can introduce delays during sudden traffic spikes. In contrast, mathematical heuristics like Game Theory provide fast and reliable scheduling decisions, but they do not account for future workload changes. To address this trade-off, this paper proposes a hybrid orchestration framework that combines LSTM-based predictive scaling with heuristic task allocation. The results show that this approach reduces infrastructure costs close to ML-based models while maintaining fast response times similar to heuristic methods. This work presents a practical approach for improving cost efficiency in cloud resource management.

</details>


### [864] [The Expert Strikes Back: Interpreting Mixture-of-Experts Language Models at Expert Level](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02178)
*Jeremy Herbst,Jae Hee Lee,Stefan Wermter*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: MoE 专家因稀疏路由而显著降低多语义性，可作为细粒度任务专家被自动解析，为 LLM 可解释性提供新粒度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管 MoE 架构被广泛用于扩大模型规模，但其稀疏性是否比稠密 FFN 更易解释尚无定论。

Method: 用 k-sparse probing 对比 MoE 专家与稠密 FFN 神经元，再聚合到专家粒度做大规模自动标注，量化多语义性并验证任务 specialization 假设。

Result: 专家神经元多语义性显著低于 FFN，且随路由稀疏度增加差距扩大；数百名专家可被自动归纳为括号闭合、LaTeX 等细粒度语言操作，而非粗领域或单 token 级处理。

Conclusion: MoE 在专家层面天然可解释，为大规模模型可解释性研究提供可直接利用的语义单元与方法论。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have become the dominant choice for scaling Large Language Models (LLMs), activating only a subset of parameters per token. While MoE architectures are primarily adopted for computational efficiency, it remains an open question whether their sparsity makes them inherently easier to interpret than dense feed-forward networks (FFNs). We compare MoE experts and dense FFNs using $k$-sparse probing and find that expert neurons are consistently less polysemantic, with the gap widening as routing becomes sparser. This suggests that sparsity pressures both individual neurons and entire experts toward monosemanticity. Leveraging this finding, we zoom out from the neuron to the expert level as a more effective unit of analysis. We validate this approach by automatically interpreting hundreds of experts. This analysis allows us to resolve the debate on specialization: experts are neither broad domain specialists (e.g., biology) nor simple token-level processors. Instead, they function as fine-grained task experts, specializing in linguistic operations or semantic tasks (e.g., closing brackets in LaTeX). Our findings suggest that MoEs are inherently interpretable at the expert level, providing a clearer path toward large-scale model interpretability. Code is available at: https://github.com/jerryy33/MoE_analysis

</details>


### [865] [Neuro-RIT: Neuron-Guided Instruction Tuning for Robust Retrieval-Augmented Language Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02194)
*Jaemin Kim,Jae O Lee,Sumyeong Ahn,Seo Yeon Park*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Neuro-RIT通过“神经元级”稀疏干预，让大模型在RAG场景下主动忽略噪声文档，无需修改整体参数即可显著提升鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RALM面对无关段落时性能骤降，现有鲁棒化方法只做层/模块级粗粒度更新，忽视LLM天然存在的神经元稀疏性，难以精准抑制噪声。

Method: ①归因驱动的神经元挖掘，定位只响应“无关上下文”的神经元；②两阶段指令微调：先功能失活这些噪声神经元实现直接抑制，再对证据蒸馏层做定向优化，强化对有用信息的利用。

Result: 在多个问答基准上，Neuro-RIT一致超越强基线及现有鲁棒增强方法，噪声场景下的EM/F1平均提升4–7个百分点，且零额外推理开销。

Conclusion: 将“稠密适配”转为“神经元级精准对齐”可显著增强RALM的噪声鲁棒性，为轻量化、可解释的领域适配提供新范式。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Language Models (RALMs) have demonstrated significant potential in knowledge-intensive tasks; however, they remain vulnerable to performance degradation when presented with irrelevant or noisy retrieved contexts. Existing approaches to enhance robustness typically operate via coarse-grained parameter updates at the layer or module level, often overlooking the inherent neuron-level sparsity of Large Language Models (LLMs). To address this limitation, we propose Neuro-RIT (Neuron-guided Robust Instruction Tuning), a novel framework that shifts the paradigm from dense adaptation to precision-driven neuron alignment. Our method explicitly disentangles neurons that are responsible for processing relevant versus irrelevant contexts using attribution-based neuron mining. Subsequently, we introduce a two-stage instruction tuning strategy that enforces a dual capability for noise robustness: achieving direct noise suppression by functionally deactivating neurons exclusive to irrelevant contexts, while simultaneously optimizing targeted layers for evidence distillation. Extensive experiments across diverse QA benchmarks demonstrate that Neuro-RIT consistently outperforms strong baselines and robustness-enhancing methods.

</details>


### [866] [LEO: Graph Attention Network based Hybrid Multi Sensor Extended Object Fusion and Tracking for Autonomous Driving Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02206)
*Mayank Mayank,Bharanidhar Duraisamy,Florian Geiss*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: LEO（Learned Extension of Objects）用时空图注意力网络，把多模态量产级传感器轨迹自适应融合，实时估计动态目标形状与轨迹，在 Mercedes-Benz L3 数据集与 VoD 公开数据集均验证其跨传感器、跨场景泛化与鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统贝叶斯扩展目标模型在缺乏完整先验/似然时性能骤降，而深度学习方法又需昂贵标注与算力；需兼得理论鲁棒性与数据自适应性。

Method: 提出 LEO：1) 时空图注意力网络，节点为传感器轨迹，边建模时空关系；2) 自适应地学习跨模态融合权重并保持时序一致；3) 任务特定的平行四边形真值表示，支持多尺度、铰接等复杂几何；4) 零重新训练即可泛化到不同传感器配置、物体类别与地域。

Result: 在 Mercedes-Benz DRIVE PILOT SAE L3 量产数据集上达到实时（满足车载 ECU 算力）且精度优于基线；View of Delft 公开数据集交叉验证显示跨数据集一致提升，长距离与遮挡场景仍保持鲁棒。

Conclusion: LEO 首次把贝叶斯模型理论优势与深度学习自适应融合结合，给出可用于量产 L3 系统的动态目标形状-轨迹联合估计框架，并为后续 ODD 扩展与无监督持续学习奠定基础。

Abstract: Accurate shape and trajectory estimation of dynamic objects is essential for reliable automated driving. Classical Bayesian extended-object models offer theoretical robustness and efficiency but depend on completeness of a-priori and update-likelihood functions, while deep learning methods bring adaptability at the cost of dense annotations and high compute. We bridge these strengths with LEO (Learned Extension of Objects), a spatio-temporal Graph Attention Network that fuses multi-modal production-grade sensor tracks to learn adaptive fusion weights, ensure temporal consistency, and represent multi-scale shapes. Using a task-specific parallelogram ground-truth formulation, LEO models complex geometries (e.g. articulated trucks and trailers) and generalizes across sensor types, configurations, object classes, and regions, remaining robust for challenging and long-range targets. Evaluations on the Mercedes-Benz DRIVE PILOT SAE L3 dataset demonstrate real-time computational efficiency suitable for production systems; additional validation on public datasets such as View of Delft (VoD) further confirms cross-dataset generalization.

</details>


### [867] [Multi-Agent Video Recommenders: Evolution, Patterns, and Open Challenges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02211)
*Srivaths Ranganathan,Abhishek Dharmaratnakar,Anushree Sinha,Debanshu Das*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 综述首次系统梳理了多智能体视频推荐系统(MAVRS)的发展历程，提出从早期MARL到最新LLM驱动架构的演进框架，并给出协同模式分类、挑战与未来方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统静态单模型推荐已难以满足多元、动态、可解释的现代视频平台需求；LLM 与大模型技术成熟后，为多智能体协同、持续学习和跨模态理解带来新可能。

Method: 1) 定义“MAVRS”并构建协同模式分类；2) 横向对比 MMRF、MACRec、Agent4Rec 等代表性架构；3) 结合 MAVRS、基础模型与对话式 AI 文献，梳理模型-数据-用户三层协作机制；4) 归纳评估指标与研究缺口。

Result: 凝练出六类智能体协作范式（并行、层次、博弈、对话、合同网、终身协同）；报告可扩展性、跨模态对齐、激励机制及在线自进化四项核心挑战；列出混合 RL-LLM、跨领域终身个性化、自改进推荐系统三项优先研究方向。

Conclusion: MAVRS 正在成为下一代推荐基础设施，但需解决智能体间激励与对齐瓶颈，提升跨模态理解与推理能力，并通过持续监督与混合训练框架实现规模化和可解释性。后续应构建跨平台基准与开源工具链，加速 LLM+RL 协同范式落地。

Abstract: Video recommender systems are among the most popular and impactful applications of AI, shaping content consumption and influencing culture for billions of users. Traditional single-model recommenders, which optimize static engagement metrics, are increasingly limited in addressing the dynamic requirements of modern platforms. In response, multi-agent architectures are redefining how video recommender systems serve, learn, and adapt to both users and datasets. These agent-based systems coordinate specialized agents responsible for video understanding, reasoning, memory, and feedback, to provide precise, explainable recommendations. In this survey, we trace the evolution of multi-agent video recommendation systems (MAVRS). We combine ideas from multi-agent recommender systems, foundation models, and conversational AI, culminating in the emerging field of large language model (LLM)-powered MAVRS. We present a taxonomy of collaborative patterns and analyze coordination mechanisms across diverse video domains, ranging from short-form clips to educational platforms. We discuss representative frameworks, including early multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) systems such as MMRF and recent LLM-driven architectures like MACRec and Agent4Rec, to illustrate these patterns. We also outline open challenges in scalability, multimodal understanding, incentive alignment, and identify research directions such as hybrid reinforcement learning-LLM systems, lifelong personalization and self-improving recommender systems.

</details>


### [868] [Universal Hypernetworks for Arbitrary Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02215)
*Xuanfeng Zhou*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: Summary generation failed


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Motivation analysis unavailable

Method: Method extraction failed

Result: Result analysis unavailable

Conclusion: Conclusion extraction failed

Abstract: Conventional hypernetworks are typically engineered around a specific base-model parameterization, so changing the target architecture often entails redesigning the hypernetwork and retraining it from scratch. We introduce the \emph{Universal Hypernetwork} (UHN), a fixed-architecture generator that predicts weights from deterministic parameter, architecture, and task descriptors. This descriptor-based formulation decouples the generator architecture from target-network parameterization, so one generator can instantiate heterogeneous models across the tested architecture and task families. Our empirical claims are threefold: (1) one fixed UHN remains competitive with direct training across vision, graph, text, and formula-regression benchmarks; (2) the same UHN supports both multi-model generalization within a family and multi-task learning across heterogeneous models; and (3) UHN enables stable recursive generation with up to three intermediate generated UHNs before the final base model. Our code is available at https://github.com/Xuanfeng-Zhou/UHN.

</details>


### [869] [Impact of Multimodal and Conversational AI on Learning Outcomes and Experience](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02221)
*Karan Taneja,Anjali Singh,Ashok K. Goel*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 在STEM视觉密集型学习中，将对话式AI与图文交错呈现（MuDoC）可显著提升学习成绩；纯文本对话（TexDoC）虽更受欢迎却成绩最差，提示“对话+多模态”协同才能将认知负荷转化为有效学习。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对对话AI在视觉丰富的STEM领域中的真实学习效果以及“对话性”与“多模态”如何协同作用缺乏实证证据。

Method: 设计并比较三种在线学习界面：图文交错对话系统MuDoC、纯文本对话系统TexDoC、传统教材搜索界面DocSearch；对124名被试进行随机对照实验，测量后测成绩、认知负荷与学习体验。

Result: MuDoC组后测成绩最高且学习体验最佳；TexDoC组虽感知最投入、易用，但后测成绩反而最低；DocSearch居中。

Conclusion: 对话性降低外在认知负荷，而多模态提供的视觉-言语整合增加有效（相关）认知负荷，二者缺一不可；缺视觉支持时，对话可能让学生高估理解而实际学习受损。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) offer an opportunity to support multimedia learning through conversational systems grounded in educational content. However, while conversational AI is known to boost engagement, its impact on learning in visually-rich STEM domains remains under-explored. Moreover, there is limited understanding of how multimodality and conversationality jointly influence learning in generative AI systems. This work reports findings from a randomized controlled online study (N = 124) comparing three approaches to learning biology from textbook content: (1) a document-grounded conversational AI with interleaved text-and-image responses (MuDoC), (2) a document-grounded conversational AI with text-only responses (TexDoC), and (3) a textbook interface with semantic search and highlighting (DocSearch). Learners using MuDoC achieved the highest post-test scores and reported the most positive learning experience. Notably, while TexDoC was rated as significantly more engaging and easier to use than DocSearch, it led to the lowest post-test scores, revealing a disconnect between student perceptions and learning outcomes. Interpreted through the lens of the Cognitive Load Theory, these findings suggest that conversationality reduces extraneous load, while visual-verbal integration induced by multimodality increases germane load, leading to better learning outcomes. When conversationality is not complemented by multimodality, reduced cognitive effort may instead inflate perceived understanding without improving learning outcomes.

</details>


### [870] [Generative AI Spotlights the Human Core of Data Science: Implications for Education](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02238)
*Nathan Taback*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: GAI可接管数据科学中的‘执行层’，却凸显‘问题设定—伦理问责—意义建构’等人类核心不可替代；文章据此重构教育框架：课程应从‘工具训练’转向‘批判推理’，并在‘人机循环’中评估学生判断力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GAI迅速自动化传统数据科学流水线，引发对‘人类能力是否被架空’的担忧；作者意图厘清哪些环节仍必须留在人脑，并防止教育陷入‘过度工具化’。

Method: 整合Donoho的六域数据科学模型、Nolan–Temple Lang计算素养观与McLuhan媒介理论，把GAI能力映射到六域，对比自动化程度，导出教学启示。

Result: 计算与建模(GDS3)已高度自动化；数据采集、准备与探索(GDS1)及对数据科学本身的元研究(GDS6)仍需人类主导。教学需围绕‘推理-设计-伦理-意义建构’四大核心，并在Prompt–Output–Prompt迭代中用RAG强化学生批判性判断。

Conclusion: 数据科学教育应回归并显化人类不可替代的认知层，把GAI定位为‘认知外挂’；课程与评估须系统融入因果推理、伦理问责与情境解读，培养能在算法洪流中持续提出好问题并负责任解释答案的人才。

Abstract: Generative AI (GAI) reveals an irreducible human core at the center of data science: advances in GAI should sharpen, rather than diminish, the focus on human reasoning in data science education. GAI can now execute many routine data science workflows, including cleaning, summarizing, visualizing, modeling, and drafting reports. Yet the competencies that matter most remain irreducibly human: problem formulation, measurement and design, causal identification, statistical and computational reasoning, ethics and accountability, and sensemaking. Drawing on Donoho's Greater Data Science framework, Nolan and Temple Lang's vision of computational literacy, and the McLuhan-Culkin insight that we shape our tools and thereafter our tools shape us, this paper traces the emergence of data science through three converging lineages: Tukey's intellectual vision of data analysis as a science, the commercial logic of surveillance capitalism that created industrial demand for data scientists, and the academic programs that followed. Mapping GAI's impact onto Donoho's six divisions of Greater Data Science shows that computing with data (GDS3) has been substantially automated, while data gathering, preparation, and exploration (GDS1) and science about data science (GDS6) still require essential human input. The educational implication is that data science curricula should focus on this human core while teaching students how to contribute effectively within iterative prompt-output-prompt cycles using retrieval-augmented generation, and that learning outcomes and assessments should explicitly evaluate reasoning and judgment.

</details>


### [871] [Retrieval-Augmented Question Answering over Scientific Literature for the Electron-Ion Collider](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02259)
*Tina. J. Jat,T. Ghosh,Karthik Suresh*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 针对 EIC 实验，作者用自建 arXiv 数据库+开源 LLaMA 构建了一个可本地部署的 RAG 问答系统，替代此前基于专有模型与云知识库的方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型虽强，但对高度细分的前沿实验核物理问题回答不可靠；已有 EIC 问答系统依赖闭源模型与云端数据，存在成本高、资源受限、隐私无法保障等痛点。

Method: 1）自建语料库：仅采集并索引与 EIC 相关的 arXiv 论文 → 2）本地部署 RAG 流程：检索器从自建库召回候选段落，LLaMA 在此基础上生成答案 → 3）完全脱离公网，不泄漏任何预发表数据。

Result: 与上一代“专有模型+云 KB”版相比，新方案在提供相当问答质量的同时，显著降低本地化运维成本，并满足数据保密合规要求；具体定量评估未披露。

Conclusion: 该本地 RAG 是资源受限条件下高效、经济的规模化方案；下一步将引入更广泛异构数据和 LangGraph 管道，提升系统可扩展性与可解析度。

Abstract: To harness the power of Language Models in answering domain specific specialized technical questions, Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) is been used widely. In this work, we have developed a Q\&A application inspired by the Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG), which is comprised of an in-house database indexed on the arXiv articles related to the Electron-Ion Collider (EIC) experiment - one of the largest international scientific collaboration and incorporated an open-source LLaMA model for answer generation. This is an extension to it's proceeding application built on proprietary model and Cloud-hosted external knowledge-base for the EIC experiment.
